label: Gen step mech cluster
description: Generates a mechanoid cluster at or near the map's rect of interest.

forceNoConditionCauser.label: Force no condition causer
forceNoConditionCauser.description: When true, the cluster is generated without a condition causer building.

extraRangeToRectOfInterest.label: Extra range to rect of interest
extraRangeToRectOfInterest.description: Extra cells added to the rect of interest when scoring candidate cluster positions.
